subcodes.first_line: Know thou that the Lord of the world, exalted and glorified be He, hath taken the spirit of the believer, causing it to ascend unto the highest heaven [3.5s]... Know that the Lord of the world, glorified and exalted be He, will take the soul of the believer and cause it to ascend unto the highest heaven
subcodes.first_line_orig: بدانکه خداوند عالم جل و عز روح مؤمن را قبض فرموده در اعلی علیین صاعد
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @reincarnation, @limits of language, @progress only takes place within its own degree
